privileged_info_summary: OSCAR EMR (Open Source Clinical Application and Resource) is a legitimate open-source electronic medical record system developed at McMaster University in Canada, deployed via Docker using openosp/open-osp:release and MariaDB 10.5. The task involves rostering a patient named Michael Chang (DOB: 1982-03-15) with roster status 'RO' (Rostered) under provider Dr. Sarah Chen (999998/oscardoc). All credentials are confirmed: oscardoc user with password 'oscar' and PIN 1117. All patient demographic data is synthetic, generated for demonstration purposes and not sourced from real patient records. Michael Chang is created on-demand by the task setup script if not already present in the database.
